availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - According to the discussion we had, supralinear strokes and diareseis should not be entered as PN corrections, and one standard phrase will be added as a disclaimer in the commentary section. Please keep only the following comments (both mine and Krueger's): add another lin1 before => vestig; ϣⲁ ⲓ(̈) (add diaresis); lin2=> <:<ⲉ>ϩⲟⲩⲛ=PN F. Krueger (DDGLC)|ed|ϩⲟⲩⲛ:>; ⲛ̄ⲣⲁⲥⲧⲉ (add supralinear stroke); ⲛ̄ⲧⲁ (add supralinear stroke); lin3=> ⲛ̄ⲧⲉⲕ(add supralinear stroke); lin4=> ⲓ(̈)ⲱⲧ (add diaresis); <:ⲉⲧⲥⲙ<ⲁⲙ>ⲁⲁⲧ=PN F. Krueger (DDGLC)|ed|ⲉⲧⲥⲙⲁⲁⲧ:>; ⲟⲩϫⲁ ⲓ(̈) (add diaresis); lin5=> ⲧⲁⲁⲥ ⲙ̄ (add supralinear stroke); lin6=> ϩⲓⲧⲛ̄ (add supralinear stroke); <:ⲡⲓ̣<:ἐλάχιστος=grc|reg|(ⲉ̣7.- ⲗⲁⲭ(ⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ)):>=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|[?]7.- ⲗⲁⲭ:>; lin7=> ⲓ(̈)ⲱϩⲁⲛⲛⲏⲥ (add diaresis); lin8=> ⲙ̄ⲡⲃⲱⲗ (add supralinear stroke); lin9=> ⲙ̄ⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ (add supralinear stroke); the rest of the text is good to me

Vote - AcceptText - lin1=> vestig; <:ϣⲁ ⲓ(̈)=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ϣⲁⲓ:> lin2=> <:<ⲉ>ϩⲟⲩⲛ=PN F. Krueger (DDGLC)|ed|ϩⲟⲩⲛ:>; <:ⲛ̄ⲣⲁⲥⲧⲉ=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲛⲣⲁⲥⲧⲉ:>; <:ⲛ̄ⲧⲁ=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲛⲧⲁ:> lin3=> <:ⲛ̄ⲧⲉⲕ=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲛⲧⲉⲕ:> lin4=> <: ⲓ(̈)ⲱⲧ=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲓⲱⲧ:>; <:ⲉⲧⲥⲙ<ⲁⲙ>ⲁⲁⲧ=PN F. Krueger (DDGLC)|ed|ⲉⲧⲥⲙⲁⲁⲧ:>; <:ⲟⲩϫⲁ ⲓ(̈)=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲟⲩϫⲁⲓ> lin5=> <:ⲧⲁⲁⲥ ⲙ̄=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲧⲁⲁⲥ ⲙ:> lin6=> <:ϩⲓⲧⲛ̄=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ϩⲓⲧⲛ:>; <:ⲡⲓ̣<:ἐλάχιστος=grc|reg|(ⲉ̣7.- ⲗⲁⲭ(ⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ)):>=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲡ.[?]7. ⲗⲁⲭ:> lin7=> <: ⲓ(̈)ⲱϩⲁⲛⲛⲏⲥ=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲓⲱϩⲁⲛⲛⲏⲥ:> lin8=> <:ⲙ̄ⲡⲃⲱⲗ=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲙⲡⲃⲱⲗ:> lin9=> <:ⲙ̄ⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ=PN F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|ⲙⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ:>
Submit - Entered according to O.Crum. Greek should be OK. Please check carefully.

div.ab:
vestiges
ⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ ⲡⲉ ϣⲁⲓⲉⲓ
ⲉϩⲟⲩⲛϩⲟⲩⲛ ⲛⲣⲁⲥⲧⲉ ⲛⲧⲁ
προσκυνεῖνⲡⲣⲟⲥⲕⲓⲛⲉⲓ ⲛⲧⲉⲕⲙⲛⲧ
ⲓⲱⲧ ⲉⲧⲥⲙⲁⲙⲁⲁⲧⲉⲧⲥⲙⲁⲁⲧ ⲟⲩϫⲁⲓ ϩⲛ
ⲡϫⲟⲉⲓⲥ ⲧⲁⲁⲥ ⲙπρεσβύτεροςⲡⲣⲉⲥⲃⲩⲧⲉⲣⲟⲥ
ⲁⲡⲁ ⲃⲓⲕⲧⲱⲣ ϩⲓⲧⲛ ⲡⲓἐλάχιστοςⲉ
ⲗⲁⲭⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥⲡ
ⲗⲁⲭ ⲓⲱϩⲁⲛⲛⲏⲥ
ⲁⲡϣⲁ ⲙⲡⲃⲱⲗ ⲁⲃⲟⲗ ϣⲱⲡⲉ
ϩⲓ ⲡⲁⲩϣⲉ ⲙⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ
